methods.description: Process for collecting water samples from the Oyashio region of the western North Pacific using Niskin-X bottles attached to a CTD-CMS system.

steps.description: Water samples were collected from 10-m depth at a station (41°30' N, 144°00' E, 1668 m depth) in the Oyashio region of the western North Pacific on 9 May with Niskin-X bottles attached to a CTD-CMS system.
steps.searchable_summary: collect water samples using Niskin-X bottles at specified coordinates and depth

methods.description: Preparation of seawater samples for incubation by removing large particles, adding FeCl3, and controlling pCO2 levels to promote phytoplankton bloom development.

steps.description: A total of 200 L of seawater was poured into four 50 L polypropylene carboys through silicon tubing with 197 μm mesh Teflon nets to remove large particles.
steps.searchable_summary: filter seawater through 197 μm mesh to remove large particles

steps.description: FeCl3 solution (5 nmol L−1 in final concentration) was added to the carboys to promote the development of phytoplankton blooms.
steps.searchable_summary: add FeCl3 solution to seawater to promote phytoplankton blooms

steps.description: Air mixtures containing 180, 350, 750, and 1000 μatm CO2 were bubbled into the incubation bottles to control pCO2.
steps.searchable_summary: bubble CO2 air mixtures into seawater to control pCO2 levels

steps.description: The flow rate of the gases was set at 100 mL min−1 for the first 24 h, and thereafter maintained at 50 mL min−1.
steps.searchable_summary: set and maintain gas flow rate for CO2 bubbling

steps.description: Incubation was conducted on deck in a tank with running surface seawater for 3 days, maintaining in situ temperature of 5°C and 50% surface irradiance, which was adjusted using a neutral density screen.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate seawater samples at controlled temperature and irradiance

steps.description: The temperature of the incubation tanks ranged between 4.7 and 6.0°C throughout the incubation.
steps.searchable_summary: monitor and maintain incubation tank temperature

steps.description: All of the samples, except on day 0, were collected between 5:00 and 6:00 a.m.
steps.searchable_summary: collect incubated samples at specified time
